pilot_config.description: Pilot experiments use 100 samples with seed 42 and 15-minute timeout for quick feasibility checks

pilots.description: Quick 2x2 factorial on single seed to verify encoder-driven absorption signal
pilots.pass_criteria: Condition B ≈ D (|diff| < 0.05) AND Condition C ≈ A (|diff| < 0.05)

pilots.description: Single-seed trained vs random to verify absorption signal exists
pilots.pass_criteria: Trained absorption > 0.3 AND random absorption < 0.2 AND t-test p < 0.001

pilots.description: Steering test on small feature set to verify implementation works
pilots.pass_criteria: Steering changes activations (||delta|| > 1e-6) AND absorbed sensitivity > non-absorbed

pilots.description: Load Gemma Scope SAE and measure absorption on small feature subset to verify pipeline
pilots.pass_criteria: SAE loads successfully AND absorption computed for all features AND pipeline completes without error

pilots.description: Minimal test: can we load Gemma Scope via SAELens?
pilots.pass_criteria: SAE loads without error AND can encode a test prompt

go_no_go_criteria.GO: At least 3 of 4 main pilots pass (pilot_h_mech, pilot_multiseed, pilot_h3, pilot_h_safe)
go_no_go_criteria.NO_GO: Fewer than 3 pilots pass OR encoder-driven signal not replicated
go_no_go_criteria.CONDITIONAL: Gemma loading fails but synthetic pilots pass -- proceed with synthetic-only experiments and flag Gemma as future work
